## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Katia Pembayun for Visual Designer, Content Automation role at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Katia has diverse design experience, with a focus on motion design and video production](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [GrowthX is seeking designers who can adapt to AI-driven workflows and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [The role involves quality control, asset production, and developing scalable design systems](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to stay lean while scaling, emphasizing adaptability and strategic thinking in design](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Topics

### Katia's Design Background and Preferences

  - [Interested in neo-brutalism and retro-futuristic design (e.g., Yoann Putra's work)](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Extensive experience with social content creation for major tech companies (Meta AI, Microsoft, Nike)](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Values efficiency and creating reusable design systems/templates](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Considers herself a "unicorn" designer with skills across multiple disciplines](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### GrowthX Design Team Structure and Expectations

  - [Small, tight-knit team currently consisting of Renato, George Romain, and one upcoming hire](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Roles are fluid, with a 50/50 split between strategic thinking and hands-on production](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Seeking designers who can adapt to AI-native workflows and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [Focus on quality control, asset production, and developing scalable design systems](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)

### Role Responsibilities and Challenges

  - [Supporting the entire deliver org across multiple client pods](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Providing on-the-spot art direction and creative direction](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Producing high-priority assets for key accounts](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Developing workflows and systems to automate repetitive design tasks](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Communicating visual feedback across different seniority levels](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

### Future of Design at GrowthX

  - [Emphasis on quality assurance and system improvement](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)
  - [Potential for role evolution as AI tools advance](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
  - [Opportunity to shape growth paths for future brand and marketing design roles](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)
  - [Focus on staying small while scaling capabilities through AI and efficient processes](https://fathom.video/share/g7zKKH5rXsKi19NPCFxb5b5tR13x74nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX team to sync up and provide feedback to Katia ASAP
  - Katia to email any additional questions if needed
  - Both parties to consider how Katia's skills align with GrowthX's AI-native approach and design needs
